title: Abbreviations of Vaccines and Other Immunizing Agents | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
y)
MenACWY-TT/MenB-FHbp 
Meningococcal serogroups A, B, C, W, Y polysaccharide tetanus toxoid conjugate/ MenB-FHbp combination vaccine (Penbraya)
MenACWY-CRM/ MenB-4C 
Meningococcal serogroups
A, B, C, W, Y oligosaccharide diphtheria CRM 197 conjugate/MenB-4C combination
vaccine (Penmenvy)
MMR 
Measles, mumps and rubella vaccine (M-M-R II, Priorix)
MMRV 
Measles, mumps, rubella, and varicella vaccine (ProQuad)
Mpox 
Monkeypox vaccine (Jynneos)
MPSV4 
Tetravalent meningococcal A, C, Y, and W-135 polysaccharide vaccine (Menomune) (no longer available) 
MR 
Measles-rubella vaccine (no
longer available) 
Top of Page 
N – R 
OPV 
Oral poliovirus vaccine (no longer available) 
PCV 
Pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (no longer available) 
PCV7 
7-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (Prevnar) ( no
longer available) 
PCV13 
13-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (Prevnar 13) (no longer available) 
PCV15 
15-valent pneumococcal
conjugate vaccine (Vaxneuvance)
PCV20 
20-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (Prevnar 20)
PCV21 
21-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (Capvaxive)
PPV23 (or PPV) 
23-valent pneumococcal polysaccharide vaccine (Pneumovax 23) (replaced by the term PPSV23) 
PPSV23 
23-valent pneumococcal polysaccharide
vaccine (Pneumovax 23) (f ormerly called PPV or
PPV23) 
PRV 
Pentavalent rotavirus vaccine (RotaTeq) (replaced by the term ROTA, then by RV5) 
RIV3
